zh.title: 拉斯普京预言全集 - 沙俄宫廷神秘主义者的预言与验证 | Rasputin Prophecies
zh.description: 格里高利·拉斯普京（1869-1916），沙俄末代宫廷神秘顾问，留下了关于自身死亡、罗曼诺夫王朝覆灭、俄国革命、两次世界大战等预言。本站整理其书信、谈话记录及遗作中的预言，并逐条验证。
zh.keywords: 拉斯普京,拉斯普京预言,Rasputin,格里高利拉斯普京,沙俄预言,罗曼诺夫王朝,俄国革命,预言书,妖僧
zh.ogTitle: 拉斯普京预言全集 | Rasputin Prophecies
zh.ogDescription: 沙俄宫廷神秘主义者拉斯普京留下的预言完整收录与验证分析。涵盖罗曼诺夫王朝命运、俄国革命、世界大战等。
zh.twitterDescription: 沙俄妖僧拉斯普京的预言全集，含真实度验证。预言自身之死、罗曼诺夫王朝覆灭、俄国革命等。

en.title: Rasputin Prophecies - Predictions of the Mad Monk of Imperial Russia | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Grigori Rasputin (1869-1916), the mystic advisor to Tsar Nicholas II, left prophecies about his own death, the fall of the Romanovs, the Russian Revolution, and world wars. Full archive with verification.
en.keywords: Rasputin,Rasputin prophecies,Grigori Rasputin,Mad Monk,Romanov dynasty,Russian Revolution,Rasputin predictions,Tsar Nicholas II
en.ogTitle: Rasputin Prophecies - The Mad Monk's Complete Predictions
en.ogDescription: Prophecies from Grigori Rasputin (1869-1916), mystic advisor to the last Tsar. Full archive with real-world verification.
en.twitterDescription: Predictions from Rasputin, the Mad Monk of Imperial Russia. His own death, the Romanov downfall, Russian Revolution, and more.
